configure the necessary settings for the Recruitment app

The Process section

...specifies what the database can and cannot do during the recruitment process.
Enable the Send Interview Survey option to send surveys to applicants. Once enabled, an Interview Survey internal link appears.
Enable the Send Interview Survey option to send surveys to applicants. Once enabled, an Interview Survey internal link appears.
Enable the Send Interview Survey option to send surveys to applicants.
Enabling the Send Interview Survey option will install the Surveys application once the settings are saved, if not already installed.

résumé appears on the right side of the applicant's card

the browser window must be in full-screen mode

deals with items... such as SMS

Product: Odoo ... through the **Recruitment** app
It is possible to send text messages to applicants directly through the **Recruitment** app
This feature requires credits to use
Click the fa-arrow-right Manage Service & Buy Credits internal link, and follow the steps to purchase credits
When an application is submitted... it is possible to have Odoo extract the applicant's name...
To do so, enable the Résumé Digitization (OCR) option.
When enabled, additional options appear... Do not digitize: this option turns off résumé digitization.
When enabled, additional options appear... Digitize on demand only: this option only digitizes resumes when requested.
When enabled, additional options appear... Digitize automatically: this option automatically digitizes all résumés...
A Digitize document button appears on applicant cards. When clicked, the résumé is scanned...
When clicked, the résumé is scanned...
...the applicant's card is updated.
...it is possible to have Odoo extract the applicant's name, phone number, and email address from the résumé and populate the applicant's form.
For more information on document digitization and IAP's (in-app purchases), refer to the In-app purchase (IAP) documentation.
Click the Manage Service & Buy Credits internal link to purchase credits for résumé digitization.
Click the View My Services internal link to view a list of all current services, and their remaining credit balances.
Disabling the Résumé Digitization (OCR) option uninstalls the module, while Do not digitize keeps the module installed but inactive...
navigate to the main Recruitment app dashboard... All job positions appear on the main dashboard
To access the Kanban view for a job position
the Kanban stages appear
all the applicants populated in their respective columns
Each stage has a color-coded bar beneath the stage name, providing status information
job application, the Kanban stages appear
applicants for that particular job position
The names for the three status colors can be modified
The names for the three status colors can be modified
Enter the title for the new stage in the Stage title field
then click Add
To modify the settings of a stage
Click on the fa-cog (Settings) icon and a menu appears.
Then click on the Edit option.
An Edit: (Stage) form appears.
Make any desired modifications to the form, then click Save & Close when done.
The Edit: (Stage) form is where the stage's settings are configured. The fields to be populated... Stage Name
The fields to be populated... Email Template

The fields to be populated... Show in Referrals

The fields to be populated... Requirements

If Show in Referrals is enabled, this field appears.
The Tooltips section... The default names and labels are: In Progress
The Tooltips section... The default names and labels are: ... Blocked
The Tooltips section... The default names and labels are: ... Ready for Next Stage
When an applicant's card enters this stage...
Product: Odoo Title: Edit stage form
To delete a stage, hover over the name of the stage, and a fa-cog (Settings) icon appears. First, click on the fa-cog (Settings) icon to reveal a drop-down menu, then click Delete.
...then click Delete.
A Confirmation pop-up warning appears, asking Are you sure you want to delete this column?

If there are applicants currently in the stage being deleted, an error pops up when attempting to delete the stage. The records currently in the stage to need to be either deleted, archived, or moved to a different stage before the stage can be deleted.
If there are applicants currently in the stage being deleted...

relations.evidence: To communicate with the applicant, Odoo has several preconfigured email templates

Product: Odoo
Title: Email templates
Recruitment: Applicant Acknowledgement: this template is used...
This email is automatically sent out once the applicant is in the New stage.
This email is automatically sent out once the applicant is in the Initial Qualification stage.
To manually send an email, click Send message in the chatter.
To manually send an email, click Send message...
Click the fa-expand (Full composer) icon... A Compose Email pop-up window loads
The applicant's email address is entered in the To field
and the Subject is `(Job Position)`
Click the fa-ellipsis-v (vertical elipsis) button... and select Save as Template

relations.source: Create a Mail Template pop-up window
relations.evidence: Enter a name for the template in the Template Name field
To send the email, click Send and the email is sent to the applicant.
If any attachments need to be added, click the fa-paperclip (paperclip) button
